issues.sample: 2017 PORSCHE BOXSTER 718 WITH PDK HAS STARTED IN 2ND GEAR ON 3 OCCASIONS MAKING ENTERING INTO TRAFFIC AT A SLOW RATE OF SPEED VERY DANGEROUS.  1ST TIME THE PDK TRANSMISSION WAS IN PARK AND THEN I MOVED IT TO DRIVE.  THE PDK SELECTED GEAR 2 WHILE IN SPORT MODE.  2ND TIME I WAS BAC

narrative.headline: What 2017 Porsche Boxster owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 1 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Power Train (100% of reports).
